title: The Tuesday That Feels Like a Holiday
subtitle: A visualisation for picturing an ordinary day lived in the full quality of a wealthy, free, and joyful life
excerpt: A short visualisation from the Day 80 theme of a 12-week money programme. The image is an ordinary Tuesday lived at the pace and quality of the holiday version of yourself: no rush, no deferred pleasure, the same day but full.
sourceNotes: Original visualisation created for homemade.education, drawing on the Day 80 theme of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025).

content.text: A short visualisation for the Day 80 theme: celebrate a daily life of freedom and joy. The image is an ordinary day lived at the pace and quality that wealth already supports.
Sit comfortably. Close your eyes or let your gaze soften.
Picture a Tuesday morning. Not a special occasion. A regular weekday.

But picture it at the pace and quality of the holiday version of yourself. There is no rush. The morning has space in it. You make a cup of tea and drink it while it is still warm. You choose what the first hour holds.
The same city, the same house, the same Tuesday. But the quality of the day is different. You are not moving through it to get it over. You are in it.
Notice what that version of Tuesday looks like. Sit with it for a moment.
Open your eyes when you are ready. Write one line about what was different, if you want.
Original to homemade.education. Draws on the Day 80 theme of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025).
